blockers.description: CSV staging into iOS Simulator Files app is manual — expo-document-picker opens native sheet Maestro cannot drive
blockers.workaround: Run: cd /tmp && python3 -m http.server 9292, serve CSV, open in Simulator Safari, Save to Files

decisions.decision: Added 10s AbortController timeout to useCurrentUser queryFn
decisions.rationale: Supabase JS auth-token refresh can hang indefinitely, blocking businesses query and keeping isLoading:true forever. Signal threads through businessesService.filter via .abortSignal()

decisions.decision: Maestro placed at unit/maestro/ (not .maestro/) to keep it co-located with the app
decisions.rationale: Follows project convention of unit/ being the mobile app root
Native iOS Files picker cannot be driven by Maestro; CSV staging remains manual

next_action: Boot iPhone 16 Pro Max simulator, run `npm run maestro test maestro/flows/qa-04-full-sweep.yaml` as a smoke test, then proceed with Section 1 Block B (admin UAT). Stage the test CSV first.
context_notes: Mid QA-03 Section 1 iOS simulator UAT. All code fixes committed. Maestro suite is ready. The profile tab spinner fix (6505d2e) should be verified in the simulator — shake to reload Metro bundle, then navigate to Profile tab. The AuthGuard fix (4e0519c) was also committed this session — logout from onboarding/reset-password now correctly redirects to login instead of stranding the user.
